# API & State Checklist: Round End & Restart

**Purpose**: Validate the quality, clarity, and completeness of API endpoint and room state machine requirements before implementation
**Created**: 2026-06-02
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are error response formats (status codes + messages) specified for all failure modes across end-round, restart, and snapshot endpoints? [Completeness, Spec §FR-001–FR-012]
- [ ] CHK002 Are the exact room state transitions (in-progress → finished → lobby) explicitly documented? [Completeness, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK003 Is the authorization model (host vs non-host) specified for each protected endpoint? [Completeness, Spec §FR-007, FR-010]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK004 Is the full scope of "round-specific state" that gets cleared on restart explicitly enumerated? [Clarity, Spec §FR-005]
- [ ] CHK005 Are error messages specified verbatim for each error case type (404/400/403)? [Clarity, Spec §FR-007–FR-010]
- [ ] CHK006 Is idempotency behavior clearly documented for the end-round endpoint? [Clarity, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK007 Is it unambiguous which entities (participants, scores, room metadata) are preserved vs cleared on restart? [Clarity, Spec §FR-005, FR-006]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK008 Are restart and end-round authorization rules consistent (both restricted to host)? [Consistency, Spec §FR-007, FR-010]
- [ ] CHK009 Is the "finished" status usage consistent between spec requirements and the existing RoomStatus type definition? [Consistency, Spec §Key Entities]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK010 Are acceptance scenarios for each user story independently testable without requiring other stories? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §User Stories]
- [ ] CHK011 Can "scores are preserved" be objectively verified via before/after snapshot comparison? [Measurability, Spec §FR-006]

## Scenario & Edge Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK012 Are requirements defined for idempotent end-round calls (room already in finished state)? [Scenario Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK013 Is the host-transfer-during-results scenario addressed in requirements? [Edge Case Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK014 Is the empty-room-before-restart cleanup behavior specified? [Edge Case Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK015 Are concurrent/race-condition scenarios addressed (e.g., simultaneous end-round or restart calls)? [Scenario Coverage, Gap]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
